examples: He seemed sincere enough when he said he wanted to help.
He had a way of sounding so sincere. It made me warm and tingly.
The author didn't think Juan was sincere.
Alex Hurt is charmingly sincere as Grusha's soldier-suitor, Simon, especially in their sweetly awkward courtship scenes.
And his commitment to trying to find a reasonable compromise was both sincere and deliberate.
